select_when: Completion and synchronization matter more than winning an argument, and the team needs a clearer split between content and relationship data.
Hard conversations are being distorted by threat, defensiveness, or status pressure rather than by missing intelligence alone.
The next move requires directness without infringement so that truth, needs, and trade-offs can be made discussable.
A discussion needs language that expands shared understanding instead of reinforcing polluted, defensive, or adversarial framing.
avoid_when: The conversation is being softened so much that real boundaries, trade-offs, or accountability requests never become explicit.
The model is being used as vague harmony language rather than as disciplined clarity about observation, impact, and next-step collaboration.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on content-versus-relationship clarity, direct needs-and-observations exchange, and threat reduction rather than widening it into generic civility language.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor facilitation sprawl beyond the raw source's stronger directness, synchronization, and anti-defensive communication material.
Did not add higher-order composition fields because this batch remains Wave 1 to Wave 3 only.
open_questions: The output type compresses a source that spans conflict management, consulting, negotiation, and organizational transparency.

select_when.note: The source is explicit that the model is strongest when synchronization, directness, and relationship-aware clarity are needed in high-tension conversations.

avoid_when.note: The anti-pattern block directly warns against smoothing disagreement so much that accountability and real trade-offs disappear.

input_type.note: The source clearly activates on high-tension communication problems, while the compact type label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The raw source yields direct but nonthreatening alignment work, but the typed output label is a compact reviewed abstraction.

reasoning_types.note: The model is naturally diagnostic of tension and causal in how language changes outcomes, while the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
